text: Reminder: bring your rotary cutter, mat, and a quarter-inch foot to Tuesday's class. Pattern handout for the 9-patch block is posted under Materials.
Fabric list for the flying-geese block is due by end of week — please bring fat quarters in three coordinating colors.
Open studio time moved to Thursday this week so we can finish binding swatches before the next session.
No homework over the long weekend — rest your hands and enjoy the break. We resume with the color-wheel exercise next class.
